failureClass: live benchmark summary route scope failure
rootCause: After multi-run refactor, the execution source became allRunResults, but summary route still referenced results and old counters. Prior fixes patched symptoms, not the complete summary execution route.
fix: Bind summary route to aggregated multi-run dataset with const results = allRunResults before summary metrics execute.
validationRequired: npm run benchmark must reach final summary and write benchmark-results.local.json
